title: Concept Quest content graph
description: The theme-neutral structural graph for one archetype/domain. Authored by Claude Code, read by the engine at runtime. Themes (skins) live in ./themes/*.json and reuse THIS graph's node ids.

shape.description: The archetype that renders every node here, e.g. 'recursive-descent'.

themes.description: Theme file ids under ./themes/. Each is a different SUBJECT over the same structure.

spine.description: The top-down motivational ladder: node ids from first to boss.

concept.description: The ONE thing this node teaches. One concept per node is a hard rule.

tier.description: Position on the spine; higher = nearer the boss (rendered on top).

prereqs.description: The bottom-up ladder: node ids mastered first.

hidden.description: Sidequests start hidden; they surface when a gap routes to them.

clearsGap.description: Mastering this sidequest clears a gap of this concept name.

level.description: Archetype-specific level config; validated by that archetype's GameModule.validate().

failureModes.description: The diagnostic heart of the node. Maps an accumulated PLAY-state signal (tag) to the gap it implies and where to route.

tag.description: Emitted by the archetype from a play state (e.g. 'missing-base-case').
